name: Audit API Documentation for GDPR Compliance
description: Automatically audits API documentation for GDPR compliance, focusing on PII and data processing.
_migration_note: v3: Delegates to reasoning-audit-and-save fragment via core:include.

context.instruction: Identify PII (Personally Identifiable Information) in the API schema and verify if the data processing purpose is clearly documented according to GDPR requirements.
